nasb.text: You will pull me out of the net which they have secretly laid for me, For You are my strength.

esv.text: you take me out of the net they have hidden for me, for you are my refuge.

cnv.text: 求你救我脫離人為我暗設的網羅， 因為你是我的避難所。

ccb.text: 你是我的避难所， 求你救我脱离人们为我设下的陷阱。

csbs.text: 你必领我脱离他们为我暗设的网罗， 因为你是我的保障。
